details.test: Task 1: Configure cheapest 96-well robot under $60k and add to quote cart
Task 2: Select benchtop pipetting robot by width and plate capacity and save to shortlist
Task 3: Add three compatible consumables under $200 for AutoPipette X100 to shopping cart
Task 4: Request live demo for AutoPipette X100 at earliest available 10:00 AM within 30 days
Task 5: Save most recent NGS library prep automation application note after 2022-01-01
Task 6: Use throughput calculator to select robot requiring <=2 units and add to quote cart
Task 7: Find and save support documentation for E204 tip alignment on X-Series robots
Task 8: Configure integrated workflow system under $250k and 3 m length and request quote
Task 9: Register for next month's "Automating ELISA workflows" webinar at 3:00 PM Europe/Berlin
